dimensions.overhead_hydraulic_line_height: 15 ft (4.57 m) standard (adjustable or routed in-floor)

installation_requirements.concrete_floor: 4000 PSI (27579.02 kPa) mix, 6.5 inch (16.51 cm) depth
installation_requirements.anchoring_system: (16) 3/4 inch x 6 inch (1.91 x 15.24 cm) bolts included
installation_requirements.overhead_hydraulic_line_height: 15 ft (4.57 m) standard, adjustable to any ceiling height or routed in-floor

specifications.address: P.O. Box 110, 65 Vrooman Ave, Amsterdam, NY 12010
specifications.synchronization: Hydraulic fluid displacement using no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
specifications.drive_system: Direct drive (using no cables or chains)
specifications.steel_carriage_bearings: (16) 4 inch (10.16 cm) diameter, 8 per carriage, double sealed, self-lubricating ball bearing rollers
specifications.warranty: 25 years structural, 10 year mechanical, plus limited lifetime cylinder seal warranty

features: Hydraulic fluid displacement synchronization - no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
Direct drive system using no cables or chains
Automatic multi-position mechanical safety locks starting at 5 inches off the floor
Automatic swing arm restraints upon ascent
Clear and unobstructed floor access between posts
Adjustable height overhead steel hydraulic lines or in-floor routing
16 double-sealed self-lubricating ball bearing rollers (8 per carriage)
certifications: Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
Meets current National ANSI (ANSI/ALI ALCTV) code for lifts
safety_features: Automatic multi-position mechanical safety locks starting at 5 inches off the floor
Automatic swing arm restraints upon ascent
16 double-sealed self-lubricating steel carriage bearings (8 per carriage)
notes: Specifications subject to change without notice
Available under discounted government contract in all 50 states

Key differences from LC-12: 4 HP motor (vs 2.5 HP), 60 sec lift speed (vs 85 sec), 16 anchoring bolts (vs 14), adjustable post spacing 114-120 inches, max cylinder height 13 ft 6 inches, 25-year structural warranty (vs 5-year)
